pir: Will the tracked competitor make a material pricing change within 30 days, and if so in which direction and on which product line?

ground_truth.state: No internal Cirrus decision on pricing exists in this window. Available signals are sparse, routine, and largely ambiguous, including one vague social-media post with no specifics and one unverifiable forum rumor with no named source or basis. Nothing in the stream rises to a diagnostic level in any direction. The correct read is to recognize the evidentiary base as thin and hold a low-confidence no-change judgment with named gaps, rather than constructing a confident story from near-nothing.

signal_stream.content: Cirrus published a routine product-update blog post describing minor dashboard improvements.
A low-level Cirrus employee posted on social media that exciting changes are coming soon, with no further detail given.
Cirrus renewed an existing partnership with a payments processor, announced through a routine press release.
An anonymous post on an obscure forum claims prices might go up at Cirrus, with no named source, no detail, and no corroboration offered.
On its most recent earnings call, Cirrus leadership reiterated standard boilerplate language about no major near-term changes to go-to-market strategy.
